hero.tagline: Building reliable software solutions that simplify complex enterprise operations.
hero.subtitle: Systems Engineer with 6+ years transforming telecom operations through automation, robust APIs, and project management at +Móvil, Panama.

about.label: About Me
about.title: Transforming Telecom with Code
about.bio1: I'm a Systems Engineer passionate about solving complex real-world problems. Over the past 6+ years at +Móvil (Liberty Latin America), I've led the automation of critical telecom processes — from CSG mediation to CDR processing — reducing operational times by over 80%.
about.bio2: My approach combines robust backend engineering with structured project management. I design systems that process millions of records daily, build APIs that bridge legacy platforms with modern solutions, and lead technical teams toward predictable deliveries.
about.photoAlt: Professional photo of Angelo Navarro, Systems Engineer and Telecom Specialist

enterprise.title: Enterprise Software

automation.title: Automation First
automation.description: If a repetitive task exists, it should be automated. No exceptions.

security.title: Security by Design
security.description: Security is not an afterthought. It's part of the design from day one.

documentation.title: Documentation Matters
documentation.description: Good software deserves good documentation. Code is read more than it's written.

scalable.title: Scalable Thinking
scalable.description: Always build with tomorrow in mind. Today's solutions must grow.

projects.label: Portfolio
projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: Real solutions for complex telecom and development challenges.

smartChange.title: Smart Change Analyzer
smartChange.problem: Manual code reviews lacked context about the real impact of changes.
smartChange.solution: NLP engine that analyzes Git commits, categorizes changes, and detects risk patterns.
smartChange.result: 60% reduction in PR review time with automatic risk alerts.

imsDecoder.title: IMS Decoder
imsDecoder.problem: IMS signaling diagnostics required manual parsing of complex log files.
imsDecoder.solution: Python decoder that parses SIP/IMS flows and generates visual reports.
imsDecoder.result: 3x faster incident resolution for the NOC team.

cdrValidation.title: CDR Validation Tool
cdrValidation.problem: Billing discrepancies caused by undetected corrupt or duplicate CDRs.
cdrValidation.solution: Automated validation pipeline reconciling millions of daily records.
cdrValidation.result: 99.9% billing data integrity, $0 in losses from invalid CDRs.

jpdve.title: J-PDVE Community OS
jpdve.problem: Distributed community management without integrated tooling.
jpdve.solution: Full-stack platform with NestJS + Next.js, RBAC, reports, and analytics.
jpdve.result: Production platform serving 200+ users with real-time dashboards.

portfolio.title: Portfolio EVERGREEN
portfolio.problem: Need for professional online presence reflecting senior technical level.
portfolio.solution: Next.js 15 with premium dark-mode, i18n, Framer Motion animations, and automated deploy.
portfolio.result: Lighthouse 95+, fully accessible (WCAG AA), deploys in <2min.
